name: olio.llm.connection
label: LLM Connection
description: Connection information for reaching an LLM (Large Language Model) endpoint. Holds the server URL, API key, and request timeout, referenced from a chatConfig.

fields.name: requestTimeout
fields.description: Hard timeout in seconds for LLM connections. Used with CompletableFuture.orTimeout() to abort hung requests. 0 = no timeout.
